title: Changelog
subtitle: New features, improvements and fixes in each release.

entries.v120.domainMetrics: Full domain metrics dashboard with trust scores, backlink profile, and organic traffic data.
entries.v120.backlinkHistory: Backlink history tracking to monitor new and lost links over time.
entries.v120.fasterAnalysis: Improved analysis speed — site audits are now up to 2x faster.
entries.v120.loginFix: Fixed an issue where login sessions would expire prematurely.
entries.v110.multiLanguage: Multi-language support: the app is now available in 6 languages.
entries.v110.footprints: Footprint discovery engine to find link-building opportunities.
entries.v110.dashboardRedesign: Redesigned dashboard with at-a-glance stats and quick actions.
entries.v100.launch: Initial launch of Snapeous — your SEO backlink platform.
entries.v100.spotDiscovery: Spot discovery: find websites where you can build backlinks.
entries.v100.seoAnalysis: On-page SEO analysis with actionable recommendations.
